name: Paella
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add chicken drumsticks and cook until browned on all sides.
3. Remove chicken and set aside.
4. In the same pan, add garlic and onion; sauté until fragrant.
5. Stir in rice, stock, cinnamon, paprika, pepper, and saffron.
6. Return chicken to the pan; bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
8. Add pimentos, mussels, prawns, and peas.
9. Continue cooking until seafood is tender and vegetables are cooked through.
10. Serve hot and enjoy!
